title: War Robots: Frontiers - Official Ancient Relic Event Pass Trailer
description: Take a look at the Ancient Relic Event Pass Trailer for War Robots: Frontiers, the hit free-to-play mech-based action shooter developed by MY.GAMES. Players can get a look at the rewards to strive for as part of the Ancient Relic Event Pass, including skins, stickers, and more. Progress through the Ancient Relic Event Pass in Delta Force now on PlayStation 4 (PS4), PlayStation 4 (PS5), Xbox One, Xbox Series X|S, and PC (Steam).

title: Human-Dog Bond is Ancient, Universal and Strikingly the Same Everywhere: Study
description: New research spanning five continents and vastly different cultures -- from the steppes of Mongolia to the rainforests of the Pacific -- shows that hunting dogs and their owners cooperate, communicate and rely on each other in nearly identical ways, suggesting the relationship was forged in deep evolutionary time, perhaps 30,000 years ago.

title: First jar burial unearthed at Hadrianapolis ancient site
description: 1,750-year-old pithos, or large ceramic jar burial, has been uncovered during ongoing excavations at the ancient city of Hadrianapolis in the Eskipazar district of Karabük.

title: Guterres Slams Fossil Fuel Windfall Profits, Urges Nations to Tax Extra Gains
description: The Secretary-General of the United Nations, António Guterres, has strongly condemned the “excessive windfall profits” amassed by globally operating fossil fuel companies. At a time when citizens with modest savings and the working class worldwide are facing skyrocketing energy bills, the Secretary-General stated that it is completely unjust and unacceptable for oil giants to collect [...]
